content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be repurposed to prioritize which new experiences an active learning AI agent stores in its long-term memory, solving the 2024-2025 SOTA challenge of catastrophic forgetting and memory bloat by only retaining high-uncertainty, information-dense samples that drive the largest performance gains. This creates a self-tuning memory system that grows organically with the agent’s learning rather than requiring fixed manual retention thresholds.
